## Summary

Describe what this pull request changes and why.

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass (`pytest`).
- [ ] `ruff check` and `ruff format` are clean.
- [ ] Any new checks map to an OWASP category and a CWE.
- [ ] Detection is non-destructive.
- [ ] This pull request does not modify the `web/` folder (owner-maintained, blocked by the `guard-web` check).
- [ ] Any relevant vulnerability has been responsibly disclosed where applicable.

## Notes

Anything reviewers should know: trade-offs, follow-ups, or open questions.
